description: Build all landing page sections with rich motion/animation design and assemble them into the main page. Includes: animated Navbar with scroll effect, Hero section with staggered text animations and floating 3D-style brain graphic, Features grid with scroll-triggered fade-in cards, Testimonials carousel-style section, Pricing cards with hover animations, CTA section with gradient background and email input, and Footer. All animations use CSS keyframes and Tailwind animate utilities defined in FEAT-001.
steps: Create components/sections/navbar.tsx - Fixed navbar with backdrop blur, brand logo (BrainPal with brain emoji or SVG), navigation links (Features, Pricing, Testimonials), and CTA button. Include scroll-based opacity/shadow transition using CSS classes.

Create components/sections/hero.tsx - Full-viewport hero with: animated gradient background, large heading with word-by-word staggered fadeIn animation, subheading with slideUp animation (delayed), two CTA buttons (Get Started, Learn More) with scaleIn animation, and a floating abstract brain/neural network illustration using CSS gradients and animated dots/connections.

Create components/sections/features.tsx - Section with 6 feature cards in a responsive grid (1/2/3 columns). Each card uses the Card component with an icon (emoji or SVG), title, and description. Cards have staggered slideUp animations with increasing delays and hover:scale-105 transitions. Features: AI-Powered Learning, Smart Reminders, Knowledge Graph, Collaborative Spaces, Analytics Dashboard, Cross-Platform Sync.

Create components/sections/testimonials.tsx - Section with 3 testimonial cards showing user avatar (gradient circle with initials), quote, name, and role. Cards have subtle float animation and appear with fadeIn. Include decorative quote marks.

Create components/sections/pricing.tsx - Three pricing tier cards (Free, Pro, Enterprise) using Card component. Pro card is highlighted/scaled with a gradient border and 'Popular' badge. Cards have hover lift animation. Each card lists features with checkmark icons. CTA button on each card.

Create components/sections/cta.tsx - Full-width section with animated gradient mesh background, heading, subheading, email input with button (using Input and Button components), and floating particle dots using CSS animations.
Create components/sections/footer.tsx - Multi-column footer with brand, navigation links, social links, and copyright. Subtle fadeIn animation on scroll.
Create app/page.tsx - Assemble all sections in order: Navbar, Hero, Features, Testimonials, Pricing, CTA, Footer. Add smooth scroll behavior.
acceptance_criteria: app/page.tsx imports and renders all section components in logical order
Hero section has staggered text animations using animation-delay CSS
Features section has 6 cards with staggered reveal animations
Pricing section has 3 tiers with the Pro tier visually highlighted
All sections use Tailwind responsive utilities for mobile/tablet/desktop
Navbar is fixed position with backdrop-blur effect
CTA section has an email input and submit button
Animations use the keyframes defined in globals.css and animation utilities from tailwind.config.ts
All components use TypeScript with proper typing
The design uses a cohesive color palette (blues/purples for an AI/brain theme)
verification: Run: find /projects/sandbox/brainpal-l2/components/sections -name '*.tsx' | sort to confirm all section files exist

Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const page=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/brainpal-l2/app/page.tsx','utf8'); console.log(page.includes('Hero') && page.includes('Features') && page.includes('Pricing') && page.includes('Navbar'))" to verify page assembles all sections
Read the hero and features components to confirm animation classes are applied
findings: All 7 section components created (navbar, hero, features, testimonials, pricing, cta, footer) plus app/page.tsx assembling them. Navbar and Hero use 'use client' for scroll detection and dynamic rendering. CTA uses 'use client' for interactive input. All animations use CSS keyframes from globals.css with [animation-fill-mode:forwards] for opacity-0 elements. Staggered delays use inline style={{ animationDelay }} since Tailwind JIT cannot handle dynamic values. Smooth scroll added to html element in globals.css. All imports verified to resolve correctly. No node_modules needed for syntax validation - used Python to check balanced braces/parens and import resolution.
